nodes.label: Tests for dashboard.py - API endpoint and data retrieval.
Regression: turns with model='' (empty string) must group as 'unknown'.     COAL

Regression: when the user has only non-billable models (e.g. gemma, glm,     loc
Integration test: start server and make HTTP requests.

Verify getPricing returns null for non-Anthropic models.
Hourly distribution chart has a canvas + TZ toggle.
